headline: The Trade Desk Appoints Kristi Argyilan as Chief Commercial Officer, Executive Vice President
summary: VENTURA, Calif., July 15, 2026--The Trade Desk, a leading global advertising technology company, today announced the appointment of Kristi Argyilan as Chief Commercial Officer and Executive Vice President. Argyilan will lead The Trade Desk’s data partnerships team, including identity, measurement, retail media, governance and more. She will report into founder and CEO, Jeff Green and be based in San Francisco.

headline: 1 of Wall Street’s Favorite Stocks with Promising Prospects and 2 We Find Risky
summary: The stocks in this article have caught Wall Street’s attention in a big way, with price targets implying returns above 20%. But investors should take these forecasts with a grain of salt because analysts typically say nice things about companies so their firms can win business in other product lines like M&A advisory.
